editorial_accuracy.notes: 133 evidence blocks, zero inline markers. 47 malformed sources fixed across 8 chapters with proper bibliographic citations. All dropcaps cleaned (19 PDF-paste dropcaps replaced with actual opening paragraphs). 10 orphan dropcap letter artifacts fixed. Zero remaining spaced text, share boilerplate, or hyphenated breaks.

information_design.notes: 19 dropcap blocks now show proper chapter openings instead of PDF title paste. 8 duplicate title blocks removed. WHY THIS MATTERS, THE LARGER PATTERN, WHAT YOU CAN DO headers cleaned from spaced PDF format. Content hierarchy clean across all 31 chapters.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Dropcaps now render correctly across all chapters — proper first letter + opening paragraph. No orphan single-letter blocks. Evidence blocks consistent. No typography regressions.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. Clean build every commit. File size: 537KB (down from ~575KB). 4 commits, all pass build.

accessibility.notes: No regression. Evidence blocks maintain semantic HTML with proper tier labeling and ARIA attributes.

security.notes: No regressions. No new attack surface. Content-only changes this run.
